name: Cheese Fondue
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Pasteurized process cheese, sharp Cheddar, grated
2 ounces Pasteurized process cheese, Swiss, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cottage cheese with 1/4 cup milk in a blender until smooth.
2. Melt fat in a saucepan. Stir in cornstarch, garlic powder, and dry mustard; mix well.
3. Add 3/4 cup milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Reduce heat. Stir in cottage cheese mixture. Add remaining cheeses, stirring until cheeses are melted.
5. Serve with cubes of French bread for dipping into fondue mixture.
NOTE: Fondue may be transferred to a preheated fondue pot or chafing dish if desired. Keep hot during serving by using an alcohol burner, canned heat, or candle burner. Calories per serving: About 210 for fondue mixture, without bread.
